title: FORJA/STATE
description: AnkrForja Protocol — Service State Manifest. Every Forja-compliant service MUST publish a conforming STATE manifest. (FRJ-001, FRJ-002, FRJ-003)

forja_version.description: Protocol version this manifest conforms to. (FRJ-014)

id.description: Globally unique service identifier. Reverse-domain notation recommended.

subdomains.description: Secondary knowledge domains this service covers.

owner.description: Organisation or team responsible for this service.

description.description: One-line description of what this service does.
description.example: Maritime voyage management, laytime calculation, and chartering operations.

capabilities.description: What this service can do. At least one capability is required. (FRJ-003)

id.description: Capability identifier, unique within this service.

description.example: Calculates laytime and demurrage/despatch for a voyage under specified charter party terms.

endpoint.description: Relative path to this capability's entry point.

input_schema.description: URI or inline reference to input schema.

output_schema.description: URI or inline reference to output schema.

knowledge_rules_applied.description: Rule IDs that govern this capability's domain logic. (FRJ-012)

knowledge.description: Domain knowledge this service exposes. Rules must be certified in SuperDomain. (FRJ-012, FRJ-018)

rule_count.description: Total number of rules (candidate + certified) this service declares knowledge over.

certified_count.description: Number of rules with status=certified in SuperDomain.

candidate_count.description: Number of rules with status=candidate (not yet certified).

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last knowledge review. (FRJ-018)

superdomain_endpoint.description: URL of the SuperDomain instance where rules are registered.

rule_ids.description: All rule IDs this service has registered knowledge over.

certified_rule_ids.description: Subset of rule_ids that are certified (status=certified).

domains_covered.description: Domain names this service has registered rules in.

dependencies.description: Services this service depends on. Required — omission creates false operational picture. (FRJ-003)

id.description: Forja service ID of the dependency.

health_impact.description: Impact on this service if the dependency is unavailable. critical=service fails, degraded=service works with reduced capability, cosmetic=non-functional impact only.

forja_compliant.description: Whether the dependency is itself Forja-compliant.

state_endpoint.description: Forja/STATE endpoint of this dependency, if Forja-compliant.

ai_surface.description: Declares exactly which surfaces AI agents may interact with. Three categories required. (FRJ-023)

queryable.description: Surfaces AI agents may read. No state change. Trust Tier 1 minimum.

description.example: List all voyages with status and ETA.

knowledge_rules.description: Rule IDs that govern the knowledge returned by this surface.

actionable.description: Surfaces AI agents may act on. State-changing. Requires declared TRUST tier ≥ 2.

description.example: Submit laytime statement for a voyage.

trust_tier_required.description: Minimum TRUST tier required for this action.

inherently_irreversible.description: If true, rollback is not possible by nature. Must be declared pre-execution. (FRJ-008)

restricted.description: Surfaces no AI agent may access regardless of trust tier. (FRJ-023)

reason.example: Destructive operation. Human-only. No AI access surface.

generated_by.description: System or tool that generated this manifest.

conformance_level.description: Which Forja layers this service currently implements. (FRJ-024)

identity.name: Mari8X — Maritime Operations Platform
identity.description: Maritime voyage management, laytime calculation, and chartering.

capabilities.name: Laytime Calculation
capabilities.description: Calculate laytime and demurrage/despatch for a voyage.

queryable.description: List all voyages with status and ETA.

actionable.description: Submit laytime statement for a voyage.

restricted.reason: Destructive operation. Human-only. No AI access.
